root.name: replace_images_with_textbox_on_slide_5
root.description: Evaluates whether images on slide 5 were deleted and replaced with correct text box.

children.name: images_deleted_from_slide_5
children.description: Checks that all images on slide 5 were deleted.

children.name: textbox_added_with_correct_texts
children.description: Checks that a textbox with both required texts was added to slide 5.

children.name: no_extraneous_changes_on_slide_5
children.description: Checks for unnecessary additions/deletions on slide 5 beyond required changes.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score():
    extraneous = False
    details = []
    # Check for extraneous shape additions or deletions
    import pptx
    from pptx import Presentation
    prs_orig = pptx.Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    prs_mod = pptx.Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    slide_orig = prs_orig.slides[4]
    slide_mod = prs_mod.slides[4]
    orig_shapes = [(s.shape_type, getattr(s, 'name', None)) for s in slide_orig.shapes]
    mod_shapes = [(s.shape_type, getattr(s, 'name', None)) for s in slide_mod.shapes]
    # Acceptable: all images deleted, one textbox with correct text added
    # Penalize: other objects deleted/added
    orig_nonimg_shapes = [x for x in orig_shapes if x[0] != 13]
    mod_nonimg_shapes = [x for x in mod_shapes if x[0] != 13]
    # The number of non-image shapes should be unchanged except for the textbox
    if len(mod_nonimg_shapes) > len(orig_nonimg_shapes)+1:
        extraneous = True
        details.append('More than one new non-image shape added.')
    elif len(mod_nonimg_shapes) < len(orig_nonimg_shapes):
        extraneous = True
        details.append('Non-image shapes deleted.')
    # Check for extraneous slide-level changes (notes, layout)
    orig_notes = slide_orig.notes_slide.notes_text_frame.text if slide_orig.has_notes_slide else ''
    mod_notes = slide_mod.notes_slide.notes_text_frame.text if slide_mod.has_notes_slide else ''
    if orig_notes != mod_notes:
        extraneous = True
        details.append('Slide notes changed.')
    # Check for extraneous title/layout change
    if slide_orig.slide_layout.name != slide_mod.slide_layout.name:
        extraneous = True
        details.append('Slide layout changed.')
    if slide_orig.shapes.title and slide_mod.shapes.title:
        if slide_orig.shapes.title.text != slide_mod.shapes.title.text:
            extraneous = True
            details.append('Slide title text changed.')
    if extraneous:
        msg = 'Extraneous changes made: ' + '; '.join(details)
        return msg, 0.0
    return 'No extraneous changes detected on slide 5.', 1.0

metadata.task: Delete the current images on slide 5 and replace it with a text box containing 'Image Placeholder - Eye Examination 1' and 'Image Placeholder - Eye Examination 2'
